```crystal
require "array"

def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
  # If the array has 0 or 1 element, it is already non-decreasing, cost is 0.
  if nums.size <= 1
    return 0
  end

  total_cost = 0_int64

  # We iterate through adjacent pairs (nums[i], nums[i+1])
  n = nums.size
  for i in 0..(n - 2)
    a_i = nums[i]
    a_i_plus_1 = nums[i + 1]

    # We need nums[i] + c_i <= nums[i+1] + c_{i+1}
    # This requires c_{i+1} - c_i >= nums[i] - nums[i+1]
    # The minimal cost contribution at this step is max(0, nums[i] - nums[i+1])
    
    difference = a_i - a_i_plus_1
    
    if difference > 0
      total_cost += difference
    end
  end
  
  return total_cost
end
```
